ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "child_mortality" REAL /* Child mortality rate (per 1,000 live births) */,
  "exports" REAL /* Total exports (in USD) */,
  "health_spending" REAL /* Health spending (per capita in USD) */,
  "imports" REAL /* Total imports (in USD) */,
  "income_per_capita" REAL /* Income per capita (in USD) */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate (annual %) */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth (years) */,
  "total_fertility_rate" REAL /* Total fertility rate (births per woman) */,
  "gdpp" REAL /* GDP per capita (in USD) */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Cluster ID (grouping of countries based on indicators) */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "education_spending" REAL /* Education spending per capita (in USD) */,
  "internet_usage" REAL /* Internet usage rate (percentage of the population) */,
  "environmental_index" REAL /* Environmental sustainability index */,
  "political_stability" REAL /* Political stability index */,
  "corruption_index" REAL /* Corruption perception index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the cluster is primarily associated with */,
  "average_gdp" REAL /* Average GDP per capita of countries in the cluster */,
  "average_life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy of countries in the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES user_department ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing specific permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_department" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator record */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the data update */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_version" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator record */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_version_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_version_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source used for the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the visualization was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the visualization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Data source used for the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., economic indicator, visualization, report) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_data_access_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., economic indicator, visualization, report) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the annotation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing record */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., economic indicator, visualization, report) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "source_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the data */,
  "target_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the data */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date the data was shared */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sharing (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sharing record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sharing record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_target_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_source_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
